    Index

    A B C D E F G H I L M N P R S T W 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    A

    AbstractCard - Class in Cards.AbstractCard
    The AbstractCard class stores the shared attributes of card objects, which can be used for both Development cards and Noble cards
    AbstractCard(int, int, int, int, int, int, String) - Constructor for class Cards.AbstractCard.AbstractCard
    Initializes a card's prestige points, cost and id
    add(int) - Method in class Cards.Token.Token
    Adds tokens when tokens are returned to the tokenBank, increases the remaining amount of tokens
    add(String, int) - Method in class Cards.Token.TokenBank
    Adds tokens when tokens are returned to the tokenBank, increases the remaining amount of tokens
    addBonus(String, int) - Method in class Player.Player
    Cheat/debug method for quickly giving player bonuses of a certain color
    addDevelopmentCard(DevelopmentCard) - Method in class Player.Player
    Add development card to player development cards and bonus
    addNobles(Noble) - Method in class Player.Player
    Add noble object to player inventory when they qualify for a noble visit
    addReserve(DevelopmentCard) - Method in class Player.Player
    Adds a DevelopmentCard object to the player reserve when they reserve a card
    addTokens(String, int) - Method in class Player.Player
    Adds tokens to player tokens based on color
    awardChosenNoble(Player, NobleFaceUP, Noble) - Method in class Player.NobleService
    Awards the chosen noble to the player and removes it from the face-up nobles.
    awardNobleIfPossible(Player, NobleFaceUP, Scanner) - Method in class Player.NobleAttractService
    Returns Noble object awarded to player if player qualifies for a noble, else return null

    B

    BLACK - Static variable in class Cards.Token.TokenBank
     
    BLUE - Static variable in class Cards.Token.TokenBank
     
    buy(Player, DevelopmentCard, TokenBank) - Static method in class Player.PurchaseService
    Facilitates the buying of a development card by a player
    buyMarketCard(int, int) - Method in class Test.GameLogic
    Lets the current player buy a face-up development card from the market.
    buyReserve(DevelopmentCard) - Method in class Player.Player
    Removes DevelopmentCard object from player reserve when they decide to buy it
    buyReservedCard(int) - Method in class Test.GameLogic
    Lets the current player buy one of their reserved cards.

    C

    canBuy(Player, DevelopmentCard) - Static method in class Player.PurchaseService
    Returns true if player can afford a specific development card, false otherwise
    Cards.AbstractCard - package Cards.AbstractCard
     
    Cards.DevelopmentCard - package Cards.DevelopmentCard
     
    Cards.Noble - package Cards.Noble
     
    Cards.Token - package Cards.Token
     
    choiceMsg() - Static method in class Test.Game
    Prints menu for player to pick an action for a turn
    chooseNoble(int) - Method in class Test.GameLogic
    Lets the current player choose one noble from the pending noble choices.
    Computer - Class in Player
    The Computer class contains the logic of the computer player
    Computer() - Constructor for class Player.Computer
     
    ComputerService - Class in Player
    Handles the computer player's automatic decision-making.
    ComputerService() - Constructor for class Player.ComputerService
     

    D

    debugGrantBonus(String, int) - Method in class Test.GameLogic
    Debug method that gives bonus points of a chosen color to the current player.
    determineWinners() - Method in class Test.GameLogic
    Determines the winner or winners of the game.
    DevelopmentCard - Class in Cards.DevelopmentCard
    The DevelopmentCard class stores a single development card object, each development object has bonus color, points, cost for each token color.
    DevelopmentCard(String, int, int, int, int, int, int, String) - Constructor for class Cards.DevelopmentCard.DevelopmentCard
    Initializes a development card's color, prestige points, cost and id
    DevelopmentCardDeck - Class in Cards.DevelopmentCard
    The DevelopmentCardDeck class stores and manages all the development cards separated by level
    DevelopmentCardDeck() - Constructor for class Cards.DevelopmentCard.DevelopmentCardDeck
    Initializes and shuffles development card decks by level
    DevelopmentCardFaceUP - Class in Cards.DevelopmentCard
    The DevelopmentCardFaceUP class stores the 4 development cards of each level which are face up on the table for players to purchase.
    DevelopmentCardFaceUP(DevelopmentCardDeck) - Constructor for class Cards.DevelopmentCard.DevelopmentCardFaceUP
    Initializes face up cards for each level in an arrayList
    discardToken(String) - Method in class Test.GameLogic
    Discards one token of the given color from the current player back to the bank.
    draw() - Method in class Cards.Noble.NobleDeck
    Returns the first card of the noble deck
    drawLevel1() - Method in class Cards.DevelopmentCard.DevelopmentCardDeck
    Draws DevelopmentCard from level 1 DevelopmentCardDeck
    drawLevel2() - Method in class Cards.DevelopmentCard.DevelopmentCardDeck
    Draws DevelopmentCard from level 2 DevelopmentCardDeck
    drawLevel3() - Method in class Cards.DevelopmentCard.DevelopmentCardDeck
    Draws DevelopmentCard from level 3 DevelopmentCardDeck

    E

    endTurn() - Method in class Test.GameLogic
    Ends the current player's turn if all end-of-turn conditions are satisfied.

    F

    fail(String) - Static method in class Test.MoveResult
    Creates a failed move result.

    G

    Game - Class in Test
    The Game class contains the main method and some utility methods
    Game() - Constructor for class Test.Game
     
    GameLogic - Class in Test
    Handles the main game rules and turn flow for game.
    GameLogic(List, int) - Constructor for class Test.GameLogic
    Creates a new game with the given players and winning condition.
    get(String) - Method in class Cards.Token.TokenBank
     
    getAmount() - Method in class Cards.Token.Token
    Returns remaining amount of the token
    getBonus() - Method in class Cards.DevelopmentCard.DevelopmentCard
    Returns the bonus color of the development card
    getBonus(String) - Method in class Player.Player
    Returns number of bonuses of a specific color the player has
    getBoughtCards() - Method in class Player.Player
    Returns all cards bought by player
    getCard(int) - Method in class Cards.Noble.NobleFaceUP
    Returns face up noble card at specific index
    getCard(int, int) - Method in class Cards.DevelopmentCard.DevelopmentCardFaceUP
    Returns face up card at specific level and index
    getColor() - Method in class Cards.Token.Token
    Returns the color of the token
    getColourToken(String) - Method in class Properties.Reader
    Returns the number of a specific color token as set in the config.properties file Used when the custom token mode is enabled
    getCost(String) - Method in class Cards.AbstractCard.AbstractCard
    Returns the required number of tokens of the specified color to buy the card
    getCurrentPlayer() - Method in class Test.GameLogic
    Returns the player whose turn it currently is.
    getCustomTokenMode() - Method in class Properties.Reader
    Returns 1 or 0 based on setting in config.properties file 1 indicates custom token mode where the number of tokens can be set in the config.properties file
    getDevelopmentFaceUp() - Method in class Test.GameLogic
    Returns the face-up development cards currently available.
    getEligibleNobles(Player, NobleFaceUP) - Method in class Player.NobleService
    Returns all face up nobles the player currently qualifies for
    getFaceUp() - Method in class Cards.Noble.NobleFaceUP
    Returns an arrayList of all face up noble cards
    getFaceUp(int) - Method in class Cards.DevelopmentCard.DevelopmentCardFaceUP
    Returns arrayList of face up cards for the specified level
    getID() - Method in class Cards.AbstractCard.AbstractCard
    Returns the id number of the card
    getLevel() - Method in class Cards.DevelopmentCard.DevelopmentCard
    Returns the tier level the development card
    getMessage() - Method in class Test.MoveResult
    Returns the message describing the move result.
    getName() - Method in class Player.Player
    Returns name of player
    getNobleFaceUp() - Method in class Test.GameLogic
    Returns the face-up nobles currently available.
    getNobles() - Method in class Cards.Noble.NobleDeck
    Return an arrayList of Noble objects in the deck
    getNumOfCards() - Method in class Properties.Reader
    Returns the number of cards as set in the config.properties file
    getNumOfPlayers() - Method in class Properties.Reader
    Returns the number of players as set in the config.properties file
    getPendingNobleChoices() - Method in class Test.GameLogic
    Returns the list of nobles the current player may choose from.
    getPlayerNobles() - Method in class Player.Player
    Returns an arrayList of noble objects owned by the player
    getPlayers() - Method in class Test.GameLogic
    Returns all players in the game.
    getPoints() - Method in class Cards.AbstractCard.AbstractCard
    Returns the number of prestige points the card is worth
    getPoints() - Method in class Player.Player
    Returns number of prestige points the player has
    getPrestigePointToWin() - Method in class Properties.Reader
    Returns the number of prestige points for a player to end the game as set in the config.properties file
    getReserveCard(int) - Method in class Player.Player
    Returns a card in the reserve at a specific index
    getReservedCards() - Method in class Player.Player
    Returns all reserve cards reserved by player
    getTierDeck(int) - Method in class Properties.Reader
    Returns the file path of the specific deck tier (level of development card)
    getTokenBank() - Method in class Test.GameLogic
    Returns the token bank used in this game.
    getTokens(String) - Method in class Player.Player
    Returns number of tokens of a specific color the player owns
    getTurnNumber() - Method in class Test.GameLogic
    Returns the current turn number.
    GOLD - Static variable in class Cards.Token.TokenBank
     
    GREEN - Static variable in class Cards.Token.TokenBank
     

    H

    hasEnough(String, int) - Method in class Cards.Token.TokenBank
    Returns true if there are enough tokens in the tokenBank for player to take

    I

    initializeDeck(String, List, int) - Static method in class Cards.DevelopmentCard.DevelopmentCardDeck
    Reads from csv files and creates DevelopmentCard objects
    InputSafetyChecking - Class in Test
    The InputSafetyChecking class is used to check all user input for exceptions
    InputSafetyChecking() - Constructor for class Test.InputSafetyChecking
     
    isEmpty() - Method in class Cards.Noble.NobleDeck
    Returns true if NobleDeck is empty, false otherwise
    isGameOver() - Method in class Test.GameLogic
    Returns whether the game is over.
    isLastRoundTriggered() - Method in class Test.GameLogic
    Returns whether the final round has been triggered.
    isLevel1Empty() - Method in class Cards.DevelopmentCard.DevelopmentCardDeck
    Checks if level 1 DevelopmentCardDeck is empty
    isLevel2Empty() - Method in class Cards.DevelopmentCard.DevelopmentCardDeck
    Checks if level 2 DevelopmentCardDeck is empty
    isLevel3Empty() - Method in class Cards.DevelopmentCard.DevelopmentCardDeck
    Checks if level 3 DevelopmentCardDeck is empty
    isSuccess() - Method in class Test.MoveResult
    Returns whether the move was successful.
    isWaitingForNobleChoice() - Method in class Test.GameLogic
    Returns whether the current player must choose a noble before ending their turn.

    L

    level1Size() - Method in class Cards.DevelopmentCard.DevelopmentCardDeck
    Gets the number of remaining cards in the level 1 DevelopmentCardDeck
    level2Size() - Method in class Cards.DevelopmentCard.DevelopmentCardDeck
    Gets the number of remaining cards in the level 2 DevelopmentCardDeck
    level3Size() - Method in class Cards.DevelopmentCard.DevelopmentCardDeck
    Gets the number of remaining cards in the level 3 DevelopmentCardDeck

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class Test.Game
    Main method
    matchColor(String, int) - Static method in class Test.InputSafetyChecking
    Returns token color that matches with the start of the input from starting index
    MoveResult - Class in Test
    Represents the result of a game action.

    N

    needsDiscard() - Method in class Test.GameLogic
    Checks whether the current player has more than 10 tokens and must discard.
    Noble - Class in Cards.Noble
    The Noble class stores the noble object, each noble object has points and cost for each card color.
    Noble(int, int, int, int, int, int, String) - Constructor for class Cards.Noble.Noble
     
    NobleAttractService - Class in Player
    This class handle the Noble attraction logic at the end of a player's turn.
    NobleAttractService() - Constructor for class Player.NobleAttractService
     
    NobleDeck - Class in Cards.Noble
    The NobleDeck class stores all noble cards
    NobleDeck() - Constructor for class Cards.Noble.NobleDeck
    Initialize noble cards and shuffle them in random order
    NobleFaceUP - Class in Cards.Noble
    The NobleFaceUP class stores the (player + 1) nobles which will be used / are face up on the table.
    NobleFaceUP(NobleDeck, int) - Constructor for class Cards.Noble.NobleFaceUP
    Initialize (player + 1) noble cards in an arrayList to be face up
    NobleService - Class in Player
    Handles checking noble eligibility and awarding nobles to players.
    NobleService() - Constructor for class Player.NobleService
     
    normalizeUpper(String) - Static method in class Test.InputSafetyChecking
    Returns uppercase of input without whitespaces in the front and back

    P

    parseThreeColorsFlexibly(String, String[]) - Static method in class Test.InputSafetyChecking
    Returns a list of 3 token colors if colors valid, null otherwise
    performMainAction(GameLogic) - Static method in class Player.ComputerService
    Performs the computer player's main action for its turn.
    Player - package Player
     
    Player - Class in Player
    The player class store the information of a single player object.
    Player(String) - Constructor for class Player.Player
    Initialize the tokens, bonuses and name of player
    playMsg() - Static method in class Test.Game
    Prints an intro to the game to let player know the game has started
    playVsCom() - Static method in class Test.Game
    Prints a message to let player know they are against a computer player
    playVsPlayer() - Static method in class Test.Game
    Prints a message to let player know they are against another player
    printBank() - Method in class Cards.Token.TokenBank
    Prints all the remaining amounts of each color token
    printMarket() - Method in class Cards.DevelopmentCard.DevelopmentCardFaceUP
    Prints all the face up cards separated by level
    printMarket() - Method in class Cards.Noble.NobleFaceUP
    Formats and prints all noble cards in the noble face up deck
    printStatus() - Method in class Player.Player
    Returns a string containing the player's prestige points, token, bonuses, reserved cards, nobles, total tokens and total cards in reserve
    Properties - package Properties
     
    PurchaseService - Class in Player
    The purchaseService class checks and facilitates the buying of a development card by a player
    PurchaseService() - Constructor for class Player.PurchaseService
     

    R

    Reader - Class in Properties
    The Reader class reads from the config.properties file to determine the winning condition, number of players and number of cards.
    Reader() - Constructor for class Properties.Reader
    Initialize configProps based on the config.properties file
    readIntInRange(Scanner, int, int, String) - Static method in class Test.InputSafetyChecking
    Returns valid number within specified range
    RED - Static variable in class Cards.Token.TokenBank
     
    remove(int) - Method in class Cards.Noble.NobleFaceUP
    Remove noble card from face up noble cards when it visits a player
    remove(int) - Method in class Cards.Token.Token
    Removes tokens when user picks up tokens in their turn, decreases the remaining amount of tokens
    remove(Noble) - Method in class Cards.Noble.NobleFaceUP
    Remove noble card from face up noble cards when it visits a player
    remove(String, int) - Method in class Cards.Token.TokenBank
    Removes tokens when user picks up tokens in their turn, decreases the remaining amount of tokens
    removeAndRefill(int, int, DevelopmentCardDeck) - Method in class Cards.DevelopmentCard.DevelopmentCardFaceUP
    Removes a face up card and replaces the empty slot with a card from the top of the development deck of that level
    removeNoble(Noble) - Method in class Cards.Noble.NobleDeck
    Removes a Noble object from the NobleDeck
    removeTokens(String, int) - Method in class Player.Player
    Remove tokens from player tokens based on color
    reserveFaceUpCard(int, int) - Method in class Test.GameLogic
    Lets the current player reserve a face-up development card.
    reserveTopDeckCard(int) - Method in class Test.GameLogic
    Lets the current player reserve the top card from a development deck.

    S

    safeInt(Scanner, String) - Static method in class Test.InputSafetyChecking
    Returns a valid integer after checking for exceptions
    setLevel(int) - Method in class Cards.DevelopmentCard.DevelopmentCard
    Sets the tier level of the development card
    size() - Method in class Cards.Noble.NobleDeck
    Returns the size of the NobleDeck
    success(String) - Static method in class Test.MoveResult
    Creates a successful move result.

    T

    TAKE_COLORS - Static variable in class Test.Game
    Array of token colors as constants
    TAKE_COLORS - Static variable in class Test.GameLogic
     
    takeGold() - Method in class Test.GameLogic
    Lets the current player take one gold token from the bank.
    takeThreeTokens(String, String, String) - Method in class Test.GameLogic
    Lets the current player take three different non-gold tokens.
    takeTwoTokens(String) - Method in class Test.GameLogic
    Lets the current player take two tokens of the same color.
    Test - package Test
     
    Token - Class in Cards.Token
    This Token class stores the information of a single colour Token object with the repective amount.
    Token(String, int) - Constructor for class Cards.Token.Token
    Initializes the color and amount of a token
    TokenBank - Class in Cards.Token
    The TokenBank class stores all the token objects on the board in a hashmap
    TokenBank(int) - Constructor for class Cards.Token.TokenBank
    Initializes the number of tokens of each color based on number of players If customTokenMode == 1 in config.properties, set number of tokens based on config.properties
    toString() - Method in class Cards.AbstractCard.AbstractCard
    Returns a string containing the prestige points and cost of the card
    toString() - Method in class Cards.DevelopmentCard.DevelopmentCard
    Returns a string containing the color, prestige points and cost of the card
    toString() - Method in class Cards.Noble.Noble
     
    toString() - Method in class Cards.Token.Token
    Returns a string containing the color and remaining amount of this token
    totalDevelopmentCards() - Method in class Player.Player
    Returns total number of development cards owned by player (or total bonuses)
    totalNobles() - Method in class Player.Player
    Returns the total number of nobles owned by player
    totalReserves() - Method in class Player.Player
    Returns the total number of cards within the player's reserve
    totalTokens() - Method in class Player.Player
    Returns the total number of tokens owned by player
    turnAlgorithm(TokenBank, DevelopmentCardFaceUP, DevelopmentCardDeck, int, NobleFaceUP) - Method in class Player.Computer
    Executes the Computer's turn by doing these steps:

    W
